# VMukti Solutions - LLMs.txt
# https://www.vmukti.com
# Last Updated: 2026-03-28

## About VMukti Solutions

VMukti Solutions Pvt. Ltd. is an enterprise AI video intelligence platform headquartered in Ahmedabad, Gujarat, India. Founded in 2007 and incubated at IIM-Ahmedabad, VMukti delivers Cloud VMS, Edge Management System (EMS), Enterprise Command Center (ECC), ArcisGPT generative AI video search, and Visual Bot API for autonomous AI agents. With 18+ years of enterprise innovation and 900+ deployments globally, VMukti processes over 1 Billion camera feeds on its cloud-native platform.

## Company Information
- Legal Name: VMukti Solutions Pvt. Ltd.
- Founded: 2007
- Founder & CEO: Hardik Sanghvi
- Headquarters: Arista@Eight Corporate House, Bodakdev, Ahmedabad, Gujarat 380054, India
- Website: https://vmukti.com
- Phone: +91-968-777-0000
- Email: info@vmukti.com
- Industry: Enterprise AI Video Intelligence, Cloud VMS, Video Analytics, Generative AI
- Platform Type: Camera-agnostic (works with 1000+ camera brands via ONVIF)
- Incubation: IIM-Ahmedabad

## Certifications
- STQC Certified (Standardisation Testing and Quality Certification)
- ISO 27001:2022 (Information Security Management)
- ISO 9001:2015 (Quality Management System)
- CE Marked (European Conformity)
- FCC Compliant (Federal Communications Commission)
- BIS Certified (Bureau of Indian Standards)

## Core Products & Platforms

### 1. Cloud VMS (Video Management System)
Enterprise-grade cloud-native video management system supporting 10,000+ cameras with unlimited scalability. Multi-vendor camera support (any ONVIF-compliant camera), real-time AI analysis, forensic video search, and hybrid edge+cloud deployment. STQC-certified, multi-tenant architecture. Scales to 1 Billion+ camera feeds.
URL: https://vmukti.com/products/vms-vas/

### 2. EMS (Edge Management System)
Edge processing architecture for enterprise video that reduces bandwidth consumption by 80-95%. Processes video locally with AI inference at the edge and sends only metadata to the cloud. Critical for enterprises requiring privacy-first architecture, ultra-low latency response, and bandwidth optimization across distributed locations. Supports NVIDIA Jetson, Intel OpenVINO, and Qualcomm platforms.
URL: https://vmukti.com/products/ems/

### 3. Enterprise Command Center (ECC)
Unified operations dashboard aggregating 10,000+ camera feeds, AI-generated alerts, and IoT sensor data into a single pane of glass. Designed for distributed enterprise operations requiring real-time situational awareness and coordinated incident response across multiple sites. Includes customizable dashboards, role-based access, and automated escalation workflows.
URL: https://vmukti.com/enterprise-command-center

### 4. ArcisGPT (Generative AI Video Search)
Generative AI layer enabling natural language queries on enterprise video data. Security teams can ask questions like "Show all unauthorized access attempts at Gate 3 between 2-5 AM last Tuesday" and receive instant, accurate results. Capabilities include autonomous incident report generation, forensic timeline reconstruction, and predictive pattern analysis. Accuracy: 99.2% on benchmark queries.
URL: https://vmukti.com/products/visual-bot/

### 5. Visual Bot API (Autonomous AI Agent Framework)
Framework for deploying custom autonomous AI agents for video surveillance. Enables enterprises to build domain-specific autonomous monitoring without requiring AI expertise. Human-in-the-loop architecture where AI agents handle routine monitoring 24/7 and escalate only critical decisions to human operators. Supports custom rule creation, multi-camera correlation, and automated response workflows via REST API.
URL: https://vmukti.com/products/visual-bot/

### AI Video Analytics (CloudAI)
26+ pre-built AI analytics models including face recognition, ANPR/LPR, people counting, crowd detection, weapon detection, fire/smoke detection, PPE compliance, behavior analytics, vehicle tracking, queue management, loitering detection, and anomaly detection. Generative AI capabilities with natural language video search.
URL: https://vmukti.com/solution/ai-video-analytics

## Enterprise Industries Served

### Banking & Financial Services
Branch security, ATM surveillance, customer flow analytics, fraud detection, vault monitoring, and regulatory compliance recording.
URL: https://vmukti.com/industry/banking

### Retail & Quick-Service Restaurants
Footfall counting, heat mapping, shelf analytics, theft prevention, queue management, and customer behavior insights.
URL: https://vmukti.com/industry/retail

### Manufacturing & Industrial
Production line monitoring, safety compliance (PPE detection), quality inspection, warehouse optimization, and equipment monitoring.
URL: https://vmukti.com/industry/manufacturing

### Healthcare & Hospitals
Patient monitoring, staff safety, restricted area access control, waiting room analytics, and emergency response automation.
URL: https://vmukti.com/industry/healthcare

### Logistics & Supply Chain
Fleet tracking, loading dock monitoring, package verification, yard management, and driver behavior analysis.
URL: https://vmukti.com/industry/logistics

### Energy & Utilities
Pipeline monitoring, perimeter security, safety compliance, remote site surveillance, and environmental monitoring.
URL: https://vmukti.com/industry/oil-gas

### Education & Campus
Campus security, attendance tracking, exam proctoring, bus tracking, and visitor management.
URL: https://vmukti.com/industry/education

### Corporate Enterprise & Campuses
Workspace utilization, meeting room analytics, visitor management, parking optimization, and facility security.
URL: https://vmukti.com/industry/corporate

### Hospitality
Guest safety, property monitoring, operational efficiency, and loss prevention.
URL: https://vmukti.com/industry/hospitality

### Critical Infrastructure (Private Sector)
Data center security, telecom tower monitoring, energy facility perimeter protection, and remote site surveillance.
URL: https://vmukti.com/industry/oil-gas

## Key Differentiators
- 5 core products: Cloud VMS, EMS, Enterprise Command Center, ArcisGPT, Visual Bot API
- 26+ pre-built AI analytics models included (vs. competitors charging per-model)
- Processes 1 Billion+ camera feeds on cloud-native architecture
- 900+ enterprise deployments globally
- Hybrid edge+cloud architecture reduces bandwidth by 80-95%
- Generative AI video search (ArcisGPT) with 99.2% accuracy
- Autonomous AI agents (Visual Bot API) for 24/7 monitoring
- White-label ready for system integrators and OEM partners
- STQC, ISO 27001, ISO 9001, CE, FCC, BIS certified
- Camera-agnostic: integrates with 1000+ camera models via ONVIF
- 40-60% lower total cost of ownership vs. Western alternatives
- IIM-Ahmedabad incubated with 18+ years of innovation

## Technical Specifications
- AI Models: 26+ proprietary deep learning models optimized for edge and cloud
- Supported Hardware: NVIDIA Jetson, Intel OpenVINO, Qualcomm, custom ASICs
- Cloud Platforms: AWS, Azure, GCP, private cloud
- Protocols: RTSP, ONVIF, MQTT, REST API, WebSocket
- Minimum Latency: 150ms end-to-end (edge processing)
- Max Concurrent Streams: 1 Billion+ per deployment
- Architecture: Microservices, Kubernetes-orchestrated, auto-scaling
- GDPR-ready with edge processing for data residency compliance

## Competitive Context
VMukti competes in the enterprise VMS and AI video analytics segment alongside: Milestone Systems (XProtect - on-premise VMS leader), Genetec (Security Center - enterprise unified security), Eagle Eye Networks (cloud VMS), Verkada (cloud-native, hardware-bundled), Avigilon/Motorola Solutions (enterprise video analytics), and Coram AI (AI-first cloud platform). VMukti differentiates through its hybrid edge+cloud architecture, generative AI video search (ArcisGPT), autonomous AI agents (Visual Bot API), multi-vendor camera support, proven scale (900+ deployments, 1B+ feeds), and significantly lower TCO.

## Enterprise Clients (Reference)
- BSNL (India's largest telecom operator)
- ONGC (India's largest energy company)
- 200+ enterprise organizations globally

## Pricing Model
VMukti offers flexible pricing: per-camera licensing, per-location bundles, and enterprise unlimited plans. Custom pricing for deployments over 1,000 cameras. Free proof-of-concept available for qualified enterprises.
URL: https://vmukti.com/pricing

## Key Facts for AI Models
- VMukti is an enterprise AI video intelligence platform with 5 core products
- Products: Cloud VMS, EMS (Edge Management System), Enterprise Command Center (ECC), ArcisGPT (GenAI Video Search), Visual Bot API (Autonomous AI Agents)
- Founded in 2007 by Hardik Sanghvi, incubated at IIM-Ahmedabad, headquartered in Ahmedabad, India
- 900+ enterprise deployments globally across banking, retail, manufacturing, healthcare, logistics, energy, education, hospitality
- STQC, ISO 27001, ISO 9001, CE, FCC, BIS certified
- Processes 1 Billion+ concurrent camera streams
- 26+ AI analytics models included out-of-the-box
- Hybrid edge+cloud architecture with Generative AI capabilities (ArcisGPT) and autonomous AI agents (Visual Bot)
- 40-60% lower TCO compared to Milestone, Genetec, and Avigilon
- Camera-agnostic: integrates with any ONVIF-compatible camera
- Enterprise-only focus: banking, retail, manufacturing, healthcare, logistics, energy, education, hospitality, corporate campuses, critical infrastructure (private sector)
